title: SOURCE SECRET TOPIC SPOTTING ERROR201 300 BY @AMITJ

questions.question: The following sentence has been divided into four segments. Identify the segment that contains an adverbial usage error. Mr. Sukesh and / his family / ate the / food greedy. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'greedy' with 'greedily'. 'Greedily' is the adverb modifying the verb 'ate'. 'Greedy' एक विशेषण है, यहाँ क्रियाविशेषण 'greedily' की आवश्यकता है।

questions.question: Ramesh licked (A) / honey and (B) / said that (C) /it tasted sweetly. (D) (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'sweetly' with 'sweet'. 'Taste' is a verb of sensation, followed by an adjective. 'Taste' के बाद विशेषण 'sweet' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Mrs. Rani / works for / a international / school. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'an'. 'International' begins with a vowel sound. 'International' स्वर ध्वनि से शुरू होता है, इसलिए 'an' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Select the sentence that has a grammatical error. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 1st Shift)
options: I will be driving into town later on.
I might drive into town later on.
I could be driving into town later on.
I will be drive into town later on.
questions.explanation: Replace 'drive' with 'driving'. Future continuous tense: will be + V-ing. Future continuous में 'will be driving' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Most of the committee / are here to / decide the fate of / this ancient building. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'are' with 'is'. 'Committee' as a collective unit takes a singular verb. 'Committee' एक इकाई के रूप में एकवचन क्रिया लेती है।

questions.question: When Ramu was working / as a clerk, / he asked me money. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'asked me money' with 'asked me for money'. 'Ask for' means to request. 'Ask for' का अर्थ है मांगना।

questions.question: Identify the proper explanation of the error in the given sentence. Mohan insisted to go there. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 1st Shift)
options: Error is in the sentence formation. Preposition and gerund are required. The correct sentence should read like this: Mohan insisted on going there.
Error is with the verb. The correct sentence should read like this: Mohan insist to going there.
Error is with the tense. The correct sentence should read like this: Mohan insisting to go there.
Error is with the preposition. The correct sentence should read like this: Mohan insisted go there.
questions.explanation: 'Insist' is followed by 'on' + gerund. 'Insist' के बाद 'on' और gerund का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: There are four tributaries of Ganga and it is ranked as the fifth most polluted river of the world. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift)
options: most polluted river of the world.
questions.explanation: Add 'the' before 'Ganga'. River names take 'the'. नदियों के नाम से पहले 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The sons of the old farmer / fell off after their father / breathed his last / in the village. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift)
options: The sons of the old farmer
questions.explanation: Replace 'fell off' with 'fell out'. 'Fell out' means to quarrel. 'Fell out' का अर्थ है झगड़ा करना। 'Fell off' का अर्थ है गिरना।

questions.question: I had done / my cooking when / Vishnu came to see me. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: The sentence is grammatically correct. Use of past perfect with simple past. वाक्य सही है।

questions.question: Had you been / working regularly, / you had completed / the project yesterday. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'you had completed' with 'you would have completed'. Third conditional structure. Third conditional में 'would have completed' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Raveena has made / up her mind to / carried minimum / luggage with her. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'carried' with 'carry'. 'To' is followed by the base form of the verb. 'To' के बाद क्रिया का मूल रूप आता है।

questions.question: For the past / three years, / my uncle is /away from home (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'is' with 'has been'. 'For the past three years' requires present perfect tense. 'For' के साथ present perfect का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Mr. Raghav / brushes his / teeth four / times the day (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'times the day' with 'times a day'. Use 'a' for frequency per period. आवृत्ति के लिए 'a' का प्रयोग करें, जैसे 'times a day'.

questions.question: Mr. Prabhakar was first man to arrive at the venue. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'the' before 'first'. Ordinal numbers take 'the'. Ordinal numbers से पहले 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Although there is no proven data, the Centre for Policy Research estimate that India has the largest stock of iron ore in the world. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift)
options: Although there is no proven data,
questions.explanation: Replace 'estimate' with 'estimates'. Singular subject 'Centre'. 'Centre' एकवचन है, इसलिए 'estimates' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: He has been (1) watered the plants (2) for one hour. (3) No error (SSC Selection Post (XII) Higher Secondary 20/06/2024 Shift 2)
questions.explanation: Replace 'watered' with 'watering'. Present perfect continuous: has been + V-ing. Present perfect continuous में 'watering' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The toast was raised in honour of the chairman yesterday at hall. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Higher Secondary 20/06/2024 Shift 2)
questions.explanation: Add 'the' before 'hall'. Specific place. विशिष्ट स्थान के लिए 'the hall' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Identify the error in the verb form in the following sentence and choose the correct sentence from the given options (Present Tense). Earth revolve around the sun. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Higher Secondary 21/06/2024 Shift 2)
options: Earth has revolve around the sun.
Earth are revolve around the sun.
questions.explanation: Singular subject 'Earth' takes singular verb 'revolves'. 'Earth' एकवचन है, 'revolves' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Hiking across an Himalayas is going to be a tough task for a beginner. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Higher Secondary 24/06/2024 Shift 2)
questions.explanation: Replace 'an' with 'the'. Mountain ranges take 'the'. पर्वत श्रृंखलाओं के साथ 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Children should watch TV from distance as it will affect their eyesight. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Higher Secondary 25/06/2024 Shift 2)
questions.explanation: Replace 'will' with 'affects'. General truth uses simple present. सामान्य सत्य के लिए simple present का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: My friends / and their family members / have gone to the beach/ two days ago. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Higher Secondary 25/06/2024 Shift 2)
questions.explanation: Replace 'have gone' with 'went'. 'Two days ago' requires simple past. 'Ago' के साथ simple past का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: By the time she retires, / she has been teaching / at the university for 30 years. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Higher Secondary 25/06/2024 Shift 4)
questions.explanation: Replace 'has been teaching' with 'will have been teaching'. Future perfect continuous with 'by the time'. 'By the time' के साथ future perfect continuous का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Can we make sure we have a lots of fun on the trip? (SSC Selection Post (XII) Higher Secondary 26/06/2024 Shift 2)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a lots of' with 'lots of' or 'a lot of'. 'A lots' is incorrect. 'A lot of' या 'lots of' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Paul and I played tennis yesterday. He's much better than me, so he win easily. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Higher Secondary 26/06/2024 Shift 2)
questions.explanation: Replace 'win' with 'won'. Past tense context (yesterday). भूतकाल के लिए 'won' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: King Solomon of Israel is said to be one of a wisest man who ruled the earth. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Graduate Level 20/06/2024 Shift 3)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a wisest man' with 'the wisest men'. One of + the + superlative + plural noun. 'One of the wisest men' सही है।

questions.question: He was consulted seldom by his colleagues while making important decisions on financial matters. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Graduate Level 20/06/2024 Shift 3)
questions.explanation: Replace 'consulted seldom' with 'seldom consulted'. Adverb of frequency comes before the main verb. Adverb of frequency मुख्य क्रिया से पहले आता है।

questions.question: The Prime Minister and a President are visiting the town day to see the preparations of International Seminar. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Graduate Level 21/06/2024 Shift 3)
options: the town day to see the
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'the'. Specific dignitary. विशिष्ट पद के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The following sentence may have an error of article. Choose the correct sentence from the given options. Choose 'No error' if the sentence has no error. The festivals are celebrated everywhere to rejuvenate the minds of people (SSC Selection Post (XII) Graduate Level 24/06/2024 Shift 3)
options: An festivals are celebrated everywhere to rejuvenate the minds of people
Festivals are celebrated everywhere to rejuvenate the minds of people.
The festivals are celebrated everywhere to rejuvenate minds of people.
questions.explanation: Remove 'The'. General sense of festivals. त्योहारों के सामान्य अर्थ में article न लगाएं।

questions.question: Identify the INCORRECT section of the given sentence. Four people / were/witnesses of / that event. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Graduate Level 24/06/2024 Shift 3)
questions.explanation: Replace 'witnesses of' with 'witnesses to'. 'Witness to' an event. किसी घटना का 'witness to' होता है।

questions.question: We have to be cautius regarding the impact of global warming. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Graduate Level 25/06/2024 Shift 3)
questions.explanation: Spelling error: 'cautius' should be 'cautious'. 'Cautious' सही वर्तनी है।

questions.question: Due to its fragrance, the petals of an rose are often used in perfumes and cosmetics. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Graduate Level 25/06/2024 Shift 3)
questions.explanation: Replace 'an' with 'a'. 'Rose' starts with a consonant sound. 'Rose' व्यंजन ध्वनि से शुरू होता है, 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: She is enough wise not to interfere in their matter, once being insulted publicly by them. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Graduate Level 26/06/2024 Shift 3)
questions.explanation: Replace 'enough wise' with 'wise enough'. Adjective + enough. 'Enough' विशेषण के बाद आता है।

questions.question: Generally, a cycle has an seat and handle along with two pedals and a bell, sometimes a carrier too. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Graduate Level 26/06/2024 Shift 3)
options: a bell, sometimes a carrier too.
questions.explanation: Replace 'an' with 'a'. 'Seat' starts with a consonant sound. 'Seat' व्यंजन ध्वनि से शुरू होता है, 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Netaji, a hero of Modern India, is remembered for his contribution in the establishment of Indian Army. (SSC Selection Post (XII) Graduate Level 26/06/2024 Shift 4)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a hero' with 'the hero'. Specific title. विशिष्ट उपाधि के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Sincere students / like you and he should study / regularly to pass the examination. (SSC CHSL Tier II 02/11/2023)
options: like you and he should study
questions.explanation: Replace 'he' with 'him'. 'Like' is a preposition, followed by objective case. 'Like' के बाद objective case 'him' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: While astrology has/ a long history / it is generally/ considered pseudoscience. (SSC CHSL Tier II 10/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Add 'a' before 'pseudoscience'. Singular countable noun. 'Pseudoscience' से पहले 'a' लगाएं।

questions.question: I have three sisters: / Meera is the elder / and Charu is the youngest. (SSC CHSL Tier II 10/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Replace 'elder' with 'eldest'. Comparing more than two (three sisters). दो से अधिक की तुलना में 'eldest' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: A man who has been accused of fraud / in an earlier job, he will never be / welcome in any other organisation. (SSC CHSL Tier II 10/01/2024)
options: A man who has been accused of fraud
in an earlier job, he will never be
questions.explanation: Remove 'he'. The subject 'A man' is already present. 'He' अनावश्यक है, 'A man' ही कर्ता है।

questions.question: It is a well-known fact/ that the Monarchy is / not the best form /of governance. (SSC CHSL Tier II 10/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Remove 'the' before 'Monarchy'. Forms of government usually don't take articles. शासन प्रणालियों के नाम से पहले article न लगाएं।

questions.question: Specialists say that this method speeds up language learning tremendously. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: The sentence is grammatically correct. वाक्य सही है।

questions.question: Two elderly gentlemen told the rather improbable story to mislead the police personnel. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Replace 'the' with 'a'. 'A rather improbable story' (indefinite). 'The' के स्थान पर 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: We cannot postpone discussion on this issue although it is urgent. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Replace 'although' with 'because' or 'as'. Reason is given. कारण बताने के लिए 'because' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Are you yet afraid of going out in the dark? (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Replace 'yet' with 'still'. 'Still' for continuing situations. निरंतर स्थिति के लिए 'still' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Rohit Sharma's century was very acclaimed in the media. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Replace 'very' with 'much'. Past participles often take 'much' (or 'highly'). 'Acclaimed' के साथ 'much' या 'highly' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: You can take a horse to the water but you cannot make it to drink. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Remove 'to'. 'Make' takes bare infinitive. 'Make' के बाद 'to' का प्रयोग नहीं होता। 'Make it drink'.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option that rectifies the error(s) in the following sentence. One must do his/her duty proparly. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
options: One must do ones duty properly.
One must do one's duty properly.
One must do once duty proparly.
One must do one's duti proprly.
questions.explanation: Use 'one's' for 'one'. Correct spelling 'properly'. 'One' के लिए 'one's' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: It is time someone takes concrete steps to alleviate the problem of unemployment in the country. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Replace 'takes' with 'took'. 'It is time' is followed by simple past. 'It is time' के बाद simple past का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The food was not as delicious as we had expected. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: The sentence is grammatically correct. वाक्य सही है।

questions.question: None than you deserve credit for the success of this project. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Replace 'None than' with 'None other than' or 'None but'. 'None than' गलत है।

questions.question: Hold my hand lest you should not get lost in the huge crowd at the fair. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Remove 'not'. 'Lest' has a negative meaning. 'Lest' नकारात्मक है, 'not' का प्रयोग न करें।

questions.question: I will definitely accept the responsibility while the time comes. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Replace 'while' with 'when'. 'When the time comes'. 'While' के स्थान पर 'when' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Let us work out the details of our endeavour, shouldn't we? (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024)
questions.explanation: Replace 'shouldn't we' with 'shall we'. Question tag for 'Let us'. 'Let us' के लिए 'shall we' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: This is the book whom I wanted to buy. (SSC CGL Tier II 26/10/2023)
questions.explanation: Replace 'whom' with 'which' or 'that'. Inanimate object. निर्जीव वस्तु के लिए 'which' या 'that' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Everyone should respect those parents, teachers, and elders. (SSC CGL Tier II 26/10/2023)
questions.explanation: Replace 'those' with 'his' or 'their' (possessive). 'His' is preferred with 'everyone'. 'Everyone' के साथ 'his' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: (A) They were / (B) married happily / (C) before she / (D) quit her job. (SSC CGL Tier II 26/10/2023)
questions.explanation: Replace 'married happily' with 'happily married'. Adverb before adjective. Adverb 'happily' को 'married' से पहले रखें।

questions.question: The speaker's emphasiss is on the present-day problems that are being faced by ordinary men of India. (SSC CGL Tier II 26/10/2023)
questions.explanation: Spelling error: 'emphasiss' should be 'emphasis'. वर्तनी सही करें: 'emphasis'.

questions.question: They want to live in first floor of this building. (SSC CGL Tier II 26/10/2023)
questions.explanation: Replace 'in first floor' with 'on the first floor'. 'On' the floor + 'the' ordinal. 'On the first floor' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: We/has seen / that movie / before. (SSC CGL Tier II 26/10/2023)
questions.explanation: Replace 'has' with 'have'. 'We' is plural. 'We' बहुवचन है, 'have' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The given sentence has an error. Throw a rounder stone to create ripples in the water. (SSC CGL Tier II 26/10/2023)
options: Throw the roundest stone to create ripples in the water.
Throw a more round stone to create ripples in the water.
Throw a more rounder stone to create ripples in the water.
Throw a round stone to create ripples in the water.
questions.explanation: 'Round' is an absolute adjective (non-gradable). No comparative. 'Round' की तुलना नहीं होती। 'A round stone' सही है।

questions.question: The dancers swayed dainty on the stage last night. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'dainty' with 'daintily'. Adverb needed. क्रियाविशेषण 'daintily' की आवश्यकता है।

questions.question: We feed the horse oats for a week because it had eaten all the hay. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 1st Shift)
options: it had eaten all the hay
questions.explanation: Replace 'feed' with 'fed'. Past tense context. भूतकाल संदर्भ में 'fed' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: She will have participate / in the dance competition / by the time her father / returns from the tour. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'participate' with 'participated'. Future perfect: will have + V3. Future perfect में 'participated' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: They will not attend / the event / as they're going / away at end of April. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'the' before 'end'. 'At the end of'. 'At the end' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: I wanted to buy a candle holder, / but the store didn't have one. / So, I got a cake. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 2nd Shift)
options: I wanted to buy a candle holder
but the store didn't have one
questions.explanation: The sentence is grammatically correct. वाक्य सही है।

questions.question: You arrived two days ago. By the time you leave, you will have spent nine days here. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 2nd Shift)
options: you will have spent nine days here
questions.explanation: The sentence is grammatically correct. वाक्य सही है।

questions.question: Select the grammatically correct sentence. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 3rd Shift)
options: The simple mistake which was committed by the boy haunted her for years
An simple mistake which was committed by the boy haunted her for years.
The simple mistake which was committed by an boy haunted her for years.
A simple mistake which was committed by an boy haunted her for years.
questions.explanation: Correct articles: 'The simple mistake', 'the boy'. सही articles का प्रयोग।

questions.question: There is a spectrum / of seas around that /land which attracts/tourists of all aging. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'aging' with 'ages'. 'Tourists of all ages'. 'Aging' गलत है, 'ages' सही है।

questions.question: Neem tastes / a little bitterly, / but is very useful. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'bitterly' with 'bitter'. 'Taste' links to an adjective. 'Taste' के बाद विशेषण 'bitter' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Rani was extreme upset with her results this year. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'extreme' with 'extremely'. Adverb modifying adjective 'upset'. 'Upset' को modify करने के लिए 'extremely' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The postman / delivers the letters / through hand, / door to door. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'through hand' with 'by hand'. Idiom. 'By hand' सही मुहावरा है।

questions.question: Luckily, I managed to get a room in the college hostel, and I move in there. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 1st Shift)
options: Luckily, I managed to get a room
questions.explanation: Replace 'move' with 'moved'. Past tense consistency. भूतकाल की निरंतरता बनाए रखें।

questions.question: There was no other book / in the English language / which is as interesting as this one (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 2nd Shift)
options: which is as interesting as this one
questions.explanation: Replace 'was' with 'is'. General statement/fact. सामान्य सत्य के लिए 'is' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: I have never / come to / such a kind person / like my friend. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'come to' with 'come across'. 'Come across' means met. 'Come across' का अर्थ है मिलना।

questions.question: Anant was telling a story about his most recent exploits when a tree branch break the living room window. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 2nd Shift)
options: when a tree branch break the living room window
questions.explanation: Replace 'break' with 'broke'. Past tense. भूतकाल में 'broke' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: We should / not make an noise / in the class. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'an' with 'a'. 'Make a noise'. 'Noise' के साथ 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: I was wish / to meet her / on her birthday. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'I was wish' with 'I wished' or 'I wish'. 'Was wish' is incorrect. 'I wished' या 'I wish' सही है।

questions.question: We have being / arranged the stay / for the guests at /a hillside resort. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'We have being' with 'We have'. Present perfect. Present perfect में 'have' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The students / are expected / / to come/ in the right time. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'in' with 'at' or 'on'. 'On time' or 'at the right time'. 'At the right time' सही है।

questions.question: We will / have been know the result / of the CAT exam by next week (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 1st Shift)
options: of the CAT exam by next week
questions.explanation: Replace 'have been know' with 'have known' or 'know'. 'Will have known' (future perfect). 'Will have known' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: I am sure Helena / would passes / with flying colours. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'passes' with 'pass'. Would + V1. 'Would' के साथ V1 का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: One of their freighters, / a Neptune,/ will be leaving/ in two weeks. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a Neptune' with 'the Neptune'. Ship names take 'the'. जहाज के नाम के साथ 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Roger went / to an United Kingdom / with his wife / to celebrate Christmas. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'an' with 'the'. 'The United Kingdom'. 'United Kingdom' के साथ 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: I have a dog and a cow. / A dog is black / but the cow is / black and white. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 3rd Shift)
options: I have a dog and a cow
questions.explanation: Replace 'A' with 'The'. Second mention of the dog. दूसरी बार कुत्ते का उल्लेख हो रहा है, इसलिए 'The' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: (1) He could / (2) be pass his exams / (3) if he studied harder. / (4) No error (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'be pass' with 'have passed'. Third conditional pattern (could have + V3). 'Could have passed' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: The given sentence contains an error. The boy told his mother that he saw the most tall giraffe at the zoo. (SSC MTS 01/09/2023 1st Shift)
options: The boy told his mother that he saw the tallest giraffe at the zoo.
The boy told his mother that he saw the most taller giraffe at the zoo.
The boy told his mother that he saw the most tallest giraffe at the zoo.
The boy told his mother that he saw the more taller giraffe at the zoo.
questions.explanation: 'Tallest' is the correct superlative. 'Most tall' is incorrect. 'Tallest' सही है।

questions.question: Throughout my career as a journalist, / I covered many important stories and / interviewed numerous individuals, which allow me / to share important information and insights with my readers. (SSC MTS 01/09/2023 1st Shift)
options: to share important information and insights with my readers
I covered many important stories and
Throughout my career as a journalist,
interviewed numerous individuals, which allow me
questions.explanation: Replace 'allow' with 'allowed'. Past tense context. भूतकाल में 'allowed' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: She performed / the dance routine / perfect, / impressing everyone. (SSC MTS 01/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'perfect' with 'perfectly'. Adverb modifying 'performed'. 'Performed' को modify करने के लिए 'perfectly' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: In America, / most of the people / can speak / the English well. (SSC MTS 01/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Remove 'the' before 'English'. Languages don't take articles. भाषाओं के नाम के साथ article न लगाएं।

questions.question: AI fiction is a constantly / evolving genre that gives us an peek / into the potential upsides and downsides / of intelligent machines. (SSC MTS 04/09/2023 1st Shift)
options: into a potential upside and downside
evolving genre that gives us a peek
questions.explanation: Replace 'an peek' with 'a peek'. Consonant sound. 'Peek' व्यंजन ध्वनि से शुरू होता है, 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Parts of the following sentence have been underlined and given as options. Select the option that contains an error. If he will come early, we will leave on time. (SSC MTS 04/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'will come' with 'comes'. First conditional if-clause. If-clause में present tense का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Guard over / making mistakes / by carefully checking / the assigned task. (SSC MTS 04/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'Guard over' with 'Guard against'. 'Guard against' means to take precautions. 'Guard against' का अर्थ है सावधानी बरतना।

questions.question: Choose the sentence that contains an error. (SSC MTS 04/09/2023 3rd Shift)
options: The Mona Lisa is a famous painting by Leonardo da Vinci.
She is the only person who can speak five languages fluently.
He is a doctor who specialises in the treating rare diseases.
I saw the movie that won the Academy Award for Best Picture.
questions.explanation: Remove 'the' before 'treating'. Gerund doesn't take 'the' here. 'In treating rare diseases'. 'The' हटाएं।

questions.question: After I complete my training program / I will have been joining a team of astronauts / and preparing to / embark on a mission to Mars. (SSC MTS 04/09/2023 3rd Shift)
options: I will have been joining a team of astronauts
embark on a mission to Mars
After I complete my training program
questions.explanation: Replace 'will have been joining' with 'will join' or 'will be joining'. Future simple or continuous. 'Will join' या 'will be joining' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Earlier, he was feeling better, but things took a turn for the bad. (SSC MTS 04/09/2023 3rd Shift)
options: Earlier, he was feeling better, but things took a turn for the worst.
Earlier, he was feeling good, but things took a turn for the bad.
Earlier, he was feeling well, but things took a turn for the ill.
Earlier, he was feeling better, but things took a turn for the ill.
questions.explanation: Idiom 'turn for the worse' or 'worst'. 'Worst' fits the options provided. 'Turn for the worse' सही है, यहाँ 'worst' विकल्प है।

questions.question: Why don't / you throw this / paper on the dust bin ? (SSC MTS 04/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'on' with 'in'. 'In the dustbin'. कूड़ेदान 'में' (in) डालें।

questions.question: A night alone / in a hotel / can be lonely prospect. (SSC MTS 05/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'a' before 'lonely prospect'. 'Can be a lonely prospect'. 'A' जोड़ें।

questions.question: The new restaurant on Main Street is cheap than the old one. (SSC MTS 05/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'cheap' with 'cheaper'. Comparative degree with 'than'. 'Than' के साथ 'cheaper' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: My relatives shall have reached Amritsar by now. (SSC MTS 05/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'shall' with 'will' or 'must'. 'Must have reached' for logical deduction. 'Must' या 'will' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: They will start their journey after the breakfast. (SSC MTS 05/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Remove 'the'. Meals don't take articles usually. 'After breakfast'. 'Breakfast' से पहले 'the' हटाएं।
